summary: Iteration 20 - P2 Features Testing Complete. All backend APIs (15/15 tests passed) and frontend UI verified. New features: Monte Carlo VaR simulation, PEP Screening & Sanctions, 9 languages in Settings. Regression: NENO Exchange (5 tabs), Dashboard all working.

issues: WalletConnect preloadListings error - non-critical, external service

critical_code_review_comments: Monte Carlo VaR simulation working correctly with portfolio data from MongoDB wallets
PEP Screening correctly identifies CLEAR, REVIEW, and BLOCKED statuses based on sanctions patterns
All 9 languages (IT, EN, DE, FR, ES, PT, JA, ZH, AR) present and selectable in Settings page
NENO Exchange regression passed - all 5 tabs (Compra, Vendi, Swap, Off-Ramp, Crea Token) working
Dashboard loads correctly with all feature cards visible
Service registry properly maps microservice domains for future extraction
seed_data_creation: PEP watchlist entry TEST_Watchlist_Entry_20 created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 features fully tested in iteration 20. Monte Carlo VaR returns portfolio value, VaR, CVaR, positions, distribution. PEP Screening checks against OFAC-SDN, UN-Sanctions, EU-Sanctions, Internal-Watchlist, PEP-Database. Settings page has 9 languages. NENO Exchange continues to work with all 5 tabs. Admin has ~9999 NENO balance, ~50024 EUR, ~1 BTC.

monte_carlo_var.GET /api/analytics/montecarlo/var: PASS - Returns portfolio_value_eur, positions, simulation_params, var, distribution, risk_assessment
monte_carlo_var.GET /api/analytics/montecarlo/var?simula: PASS - Custom params reflected in response

pep_screening.POST /api/pep/screen (clean person): PASS - Mario Rossi from Italy returns CLEAR status, risk_score=0
pep_screening.POST /api/pep/screen (sanctioned entity): PASS - North Korea nationality returns BLOCKED status with HIGH_RISK_COUNTRY hit
pep_screening.POST /api/pep/screen (PEP title): PASS - 'Former President' returns REVIEW status with PEP hit
pep_screening.POST /api/pep/watchlist: PASS - Added TEST_Watchlist_Entry_20 to internal watchlist
pep_screening.GET /api/pep/history: PASS - Returns screening history with total count
pep_screening.GET /api/pep/stats: PASS - Returns total_screenings, clear, review, blocked, watchlist_entries, lists_active

languages.settings_page_languages: PASS - All 9 languages present: IT, EN, DE, FR, ES, PT, JA, ZH, AR

regression.neno_exchange_tabs: PASS - All 5 tabs working (Compra, Vendi, Swap, Off-Ramp, Crea Token)
regression.dashboard: PASS - All feature cards visible, admin badge, user email displayed

mocked_apis_list: PEP screening uses internal pattern matching (not connected to real sanctions API like Dow Jones, Refinitiv)
